mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_log ( module, operation_type, description, method, url, request_params, response_result, ip, operator, execution_time, success, error_msg, operation_time ) VALUES ( #{module}, #{operationType}, #{description}, #{method}, #{url}, #{requestParams}, #{responseResult}, #{ip}, #{operator}, #{executionTime}, #{success}, #{errorMsg}, #{operationTime} )
